reason: Enabling SELinux enforcing mode can cause services, including SSH, to fail if file contexts or policies are not correctly set. The remediation script modifies the SELinux config and runs fixfiles, but there remains a clear risk of lockout or service disruption, warranting human review before applying.
estimated_impact: reboot required; filesystems affected; potential SELinux policy violations; possible loss of SSH or console access; requires system reboot
